log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Air Genasi — Unarmored Caster.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Air Genasi — Unarmored Caster.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:19+3=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 6casting_mod force damage. Air Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: NaN/67
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Air Genasi — Unarmored Caster.
→ Air Genasi — Unarmored Caster: DEX save [d20:2+6=8 vs DC 11] FAIL! 6 radiant damage. HP: NaN/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Air Genasi — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):4+1=5 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 5/5 targets affected.
